TEXT.citation: Wikipedia contributors. (2026). Amis Wikipedia. Wikimedia Foundation. Retrieved 2026-06-09, from https://ami.wikipedia.org/
TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_ami, title = {Amis Wikipedia}, author = {{Wikipedia contributors}}, year = {2026}, publisher = {Wikimedia Foundation}, url = {https://ami.wikipedia.org/}, urldate = {2026-06-09} }

S.FORM: Michel Temer Misiel Taymil I 1940 a miheca saka 9 folad saka 23 a romi'ad masofoc ci Misiel Taymil(Michel Temer), malamikomoday a tamdaw. O Sawara'an no kitakit no Brazil anini i ci Michel Temer, patirengan a romi'ad i 2016 a miheca saka 8 folad saka 31 a romi'ad. misaparod Śģ∂Śļ≠ O kahofocan ni Michel Temer iti i Tiet√™ no Seng PawLo, o fa'inayan a wawa ni Nakhoul "Miguel" Elias Temer Lulia ato ci March Barbar Lulia, 1925 a miheca malinah ko Maloni a tinsokiw no Lipanen a tayra to i Pasi . lalamod ťÖćŚĀ∂ Ci Michel Temer atoya sa'ayaway a fafahi ci Maria C√©lia Toledo i, tatoloay ko fafahiyan a wawa nangra, Luciana (1969),Maristela (1972) ato Clarissa (1974).Saka tosa a fafahi ci Masera Teterseci , cecay ko fainayan wawa ci Eduardo itini i Longtong a hofocen. 2002 a miheca masaso'araw cangra itini i kasaopoan no kayki, maangoha cangra, kaka ni Misel to sepat polo ira ko tolo a mihecaan ci Maseraan, itini to 2003 a miheca saka pito folad 26 a romi'ad pataloma' cangra. polong ko laloma'an nangra i lalimaay ko tamdaw. mamikowan śĒŅś≤ĽÁĒüś∂Į pitooran šŅ°šĽį
S.PHON: mi ¶ńß…ô…ĺ t…ôm…ôr misi…ô…ĺ tajmi…ĺ i **** a mińß…ô ¶a saka * fo~u…ĺa…¨~…ģ saka ** a ro~umi °a…¨~…ģ maso~ufo~u ¶ ¶i misi…ô…ĺ tajmi…ĺ(mi ¶ńß…ô…ĺ t…ôm…ôr), ma…ĺamiko~umo~u…¨~…ģaj a tam…¨~…ģaw. o~u sawara °an no~u kitakit no~u b~b~vra*i…ĺ anini i ¶i mi ¶ńß…ô…ĺ t…ôm…ôr, patir…ôŇčan a ro~umi °a…¨~…ģ i **** a mińß…ô ¶a saka * fo~u…ĺa…¨~…ģ saka ** a ro~umi °a…¨~…ģ. misaparo~u…¨~…ģ ** o~u kańßo~ufo~u ¶an ni mi ¶ńß…ô…ĺ t…ôm…ôr iti i ti…ôt* no~u s…ôŇč paw…ĺo~u, o~u fa °inajan a wawa ni nakńßo~uo~u~u…ĺ "mi*o~u~u…ô…ĺ" …ô…ĺias t…ôm…ôr …ĺo~u~u…ĺia ato~u ¶i mar ¶ńß b~b~varb~b~var …ĺo~u~u…ĺia, **** a mińß…ô ¶a ma…ĺinańß ko~u ma…ĺo~uni a tinso~ukiw no~u …ĺipan…ôn a tajra to~u i pasi . …ĺa…ĺamo~u…¨~…ģ ** ¶i mi ¶ńß…ô…ĺ t…ôm…ôr ato~uja sa °ajawaj a fafańßi ¶i maria ¶*…ĺia to~u…ĺ…ô…¨~…ģo~u i, tato~u…ĺo~uaj ko~u fafańßijan a wawa naŇčra, …ĺo~u~u ¶iana (****),marist…ô…ĺa (****) ato~u ¶…ĺarissa (****).saka to~usa a fafańßi ¶i mas…ôra t…ôt…ôrs…ô ¶i , ¶…ô ¶aj ko~u fainajan wawa ¶i …ô…¨~…ģo~u~uar…¨~…ģo~u itini i …ĺo~uŇčto~uŇč a ńßo~ufo~u ¶…ôn. **** a mińß…ô ¶a masaso~u °araw ¶aŇčra itini i kasao~upo~uan no~u kajki, maaŇčo~uńßa ¶aŇčra, kaka ni mis…ô…ĺ to~u s…ôpat po~u…ĺo~u ira ko~u to~u…ĺo~u a mińß…ô ¶aan ¶i mas…ôraan, itini to~u **** a mińß…ô ¶a saka pito~u fo~u…ĺa…¨~…ģ ** a ro~umi °a…¨~…ģ pata…ĺo~uma ° ¶aŇčra. po~u…ĺo~uŇč ko~u …ĺa…ĺo~uma °an naŇčra i …ĺa…ĺimaaj ko~u tam…¨~…ģaw. mamiko~uwan **** pito~uo~uran **
S.FORM: Michel Temer Misiel Taymil I 1940 a miheca saka 9 folad saka 23 a romi'ad masofoc ci Misiel Taymil(Michel Temer), malamikomoday a tamdaw. O Sawara'an no kitakit no Brazil anini i ci Michel Temer, patirengan a romi'ad i 2016 a miheca saka 8 folad saka 31 a romi'ad. misaparod Śģ∂Śļ≠ O kahofocan ni Michel Temer iti i Tiet√™ no Seng PawLo, o fa'inayan a wawa ni Nakhoul "Miguel" Elias Temer Lulia ato ci March Barbar Lulia, 1925 a miheca malinah ko Maloni a tinsokiw no Lipanen a tayra to i Pasi . lalamod ťÖćŚĀ∂ Ci Michel Temer atoya sa'ayaway a fafahi ci Maria C√©lia Toledo i, tatoloay ko fafahiyan a wawa nangra, Luciana (1969),Maristela (1972) ato Clarissa (1974).Saka tosa a fafahi ci Masera Teterseci , cecay ko fainayan wawa ci Eduardo itini i Longtong a hofocen. 2002 a miheca masaso'araw cangra itini i kasaopoan no kayki, maangoha cangra, kaka ni Misel to sepat polo ira ko tolo a mihecaan ci Maseraan, itini to 2003 a miheca saka pito folad 26 a romi'ad pataloma' cangra. polong ko laloma'an nangra i lalimaay ko tamdaw. mamikowan śĒŅś≤ĽÁĒüś∂Į pitooran šŅ°šĽį
